vendor: webosbrew community (dts_restore by Pete Batard; webOS-25 mechanism by this project)
title: DTS Enabler
_comment_permissions: This web app holds NO root. All privileged work is delegated to the Homebrew Channel exec service (luna://org.webosbrew.hbchannel.service/exec), called from the app's own JS service. On a rooted TV luna access is unrestricted; on retail firmware these calls are rejected by ACG (expected -- the app is meaningless without root + the Homebrew Channel).
_comment_icon: icon.png must be a real 80x80 PNG for on-TV display. A vector source (icon.svg) is provided; convert with e.g. `rsvg-convert -w 80 -h 80 icon.svg > icon.png` before packaging.
